---
title: "Draft"
author: "Patrick K"
date: "6/14/2026"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

#### load packages 
```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(MatchIt)
```

```{r}

encounters = read.csv("encounter.csv", nrows = 50000)
patient = read.csv("patient.csv", nrows = 50000)
lab_results = read.csv("lab_result.csv", nrows = 50000)
tumor = read.csv("tumor.csv", nrows = 50000)
diagnosis = read.csv("diagnosis.csv", nrows = 50000)
encounters = read.csv("encounter.csv", nrows = 50000)
procedure = read.csv("procedure.csv", nrows = 50000)
med_ing = read.csv("medication_ingredient.csv", nrows = 50000)
```


```{r}

# ==========================================
# 1. DEFINE TARGET CODES & TERMS
# ==========================================
rcc_codes <- c("C64") 
mets_stage4_codes <- c("C77", "C78", "C7B", "C65")
stage4_terms <- c("Stage 4", "S4", "M1", "TNM_M1")

# Radical Nephrectomy, Dialysis, and Transplant codes
prior_renal_codes <- c(
  "Z99.2", "90935", "90937", "90945", "90947", "Z94.0", "50360", "50365", 
  "50230", "50545", "175905003", "50546", "50548", "116033007", "446296004", "439235001"
)

# Partial Nephrectomy & Ablation codes
intervention_codes <- c(
  "50240", "360797007", "81516001", "439739008", "51870000", "50543", 
  "175918006", "175917001", "708929007", "1119317007", "1119318002",
  "716009005", "50592", "50593"
)


# ==========================================
# 2. COMBINE DIAGNOSES & PROCEDURES INTO ONE TIMELINE
# ==========================================
# Standardize and stack the tables so we look at everything chronologically
clinical_timeline <- bind_rows(
  diagnosis %>% select(patient_id, date, code, code_system),
  procedure %>% select(patient_id, date, code, code_system)
) %>%
  # Convert integer date to R Date format
  mutate(record_date = ymd(as.character(date))) %>%
  
  # Join patient demographics to calculate age at the event time
  left_join(
    patient %>% select(patient_id, year_of_birth), 
    by = "patient_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(age_at_record = year(record_date) - year_of_birth)


# ==========================================
# 3. RUN THE COHORT COHORT LOGIC
# ==========================================
final_cohort <- clinical_timeline %>%
  group_by(patient_id) %>%
  mutate(
    # --- STEP 1: Identify the Index RCC Date ---
    # Strip decimals (e.g., C64.1 -> C64) to cleanly match core ICD codes
    is_rcc = (sub("\\..*", "", code) %in% rcc_codes) & age_at_record >= 18,
    rcc_index_date = min(record_date[is_rcc], na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # --- STEP 2: Group 1B Exclusions (Before or up to 3 months after index) ---
    has_mets_exclusion = any(
      (sub("\\..*", "", code) %in% mets_stage4_codes | code %in% stage4_terms) & 
        (record_date <= (rcc_index_date + months(3)))
    ),
    
    # --- STEP 3: Group 2B Exclusions (On or before index) ---
    has_renal_exclusion = any(
      code %in% prior_renal_codes & 
        (record_date <= rcc_index_date)
    ),
    
    # --- STEP 4: Group 3A / 4A Interventions (Any time) ---
    has_intervention = any(
      code %in% intervention_codes | 
        grepl("^(0TB|0TT|0T5)", code) # Captures the ICD-10-PCS wildcards
    )
  ) %>%
  
  # --- STEP 5: Filter down to Cohort ---
  filter(
    !is.na(rcc_index_date),   # Must have a valid adult RCC diagnosis
    !has_mets_exclusion,      # Drop patients with early advanced disease
    !has_renal_exclusion,     # Drop patients with pre-existing end-stage renal / radical nx records
    has_intervention          # Must have a partial nephrectomy or ablation recorded
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

head(final_cohort)

```


```{r}
## patient demographics


## bring in patient data
cohort_demographics <- final_cohort %>%
  distinct(patient_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  select(patient_id, rcc_index_date) %>%
  inner_join(patient, by = "patient_id") %>%
  mutate(
    age_at_index = year(rcc_index_date) - year_of_birth,
    sex = ifelse(sex %in% c("Unknown", "U", ""), "Unknown", sex),
    race = ifelse(race %in% c("Unknown", "U", ""), "Unknown", race),
    
    has_died = !is.na(month_year_death),
    
    # Safe date parsing that won't throw warnings for living patients
    death_date = if_else(
      !is.na(month_year_death),
      ymd(paste0(month_year_death, "01")),
      as.Date(NA)
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    patient_id, rcc_index_date, age_at_index, sex, 
    race, ethnicity, regional_location = patient_regional_location, 
    has_died, death_date
  )

head(cohort_demographics)
```


```{r}

# ==========================================
# 1. IDENTIFY TREATMENT GROUPS & INDEX DATES
# ==========================================
treatment_groups <- final_cohort %>%
  filter(code %in% intervention_codes | grepl("^(0TB|0TT|0T5)", code)) %>%
  group_by(patient_id) %>%
  filter(record_date == min(record_date)) %>% 
  distinct(patient_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    treatment_type = if_else(grepl("^(0T5)", code) | code %in% c("716009005", "50592", "50593"), "IR_Ablation", "PNX"),
    treatment_date = record_date
  ) %>%
  select(patient_id, treatment_type, treatment_date)

head(treatment_groups)
```


```{r}

# ==========================================
# 2. EXTRACT PRE-OP BASELINE RENAL LABS
# ==========================================
renal_loincs <- c("2160-0", "10466-1") 

biomarker_baseline <- lab_results %>%
  mutate(lab_date = ymd(as.character(date))) %>%
  filter(code %in% renal_loincs) %>%
  inner_join(treatment_groups, by = "patient_id") %>%
  mutate(days_before_treatment = as.numeric(treatment_date - lab_date)) %>%
  # Lookback window: 0 to 90 days prior to treatment
  filter(days_before_treatment >= 0 & days_before_treatment <= 90) %>%
  group_by(patient_id) %>%
  filter(days_before_treatment == min(days_before_treatment)) %>%
  distinct(patient_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  select(patient_id, baseline_renal_val = lab_result_num_val)
head(biomarker_baseline)


# ==========================================
# 3. MERGE DEMOGRAPHICS + TREATMENT + LABS
# ==========================================
matching_clean <- cohort_demographics %>%
  # Bring in the treatment arm assignment
  inner_join(treatment_groups, by = "patient_id") %>%
  # Bring in the baseline lab values explicitly
  inner_join(biomarker_baseline, by = "patient_id") %>% 
  # Eliminate missing values or "Unknown" text values across all covariates
  drop_na(baseline_renal_val, age_at_index, sex, race) %>% 
  filter(
    sex != "Unknown",
    race != "Unknown"
  ) %>%
  # Convert treatment type to a binary numeric format (0/1) for MatchIt
  mutate(
    treatment_binary = if_else(treatment_type == "IR_Ablation", 1, 0)
  )
head(matching_clean)
```

```{r}

# ==========================================
# 4. PROPENSITY SCORE MATCHING
# ==========================================
# Run MatchIt with a 0.2 standard deviation caliper
match_model <- matchit(
  treatment_binary ~ age_at_index + sex + race + baseline_renal_val, 
  data = matching_clean,
  method = "nearest", 
  caliper = 0.2,            
  replace = FALSE
)

# View the balance tables (Sample Sizes, Mean Differences)
summary(match_model)
matched_data
```
